queries.question: What hotels with swimming pools are in New York and what hotels with hot tubs are in the same location?
queries.sql:
SELECT Hotel.name 
FROM LeisureFeature JOIN FeatureInRoom ON LeisureFeature.id = FeatureInRoom.leisurefeature_id JOIN RoomType ON FeatureInRoom.roomtype_id = RoomType.id JOIN Hotel ON RoomType.hotel_id = Hotel.id JOIN City ON Hotel.city_id = City.id
WHERE (LeisureFeature.feature = "Swimming Pool" OR LeisureFeature.feature = "Hot Tub") AND City.name = "New York"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?leisurefeature a :LeisureFeature .
  ?featureinroom a :FeatureInRoom .
  ?featureinroom p:hasLeisureFeature ?leisurefeature .
  ?roomtype a :RoomTypes .
  ?featureinroom p:hasRoomType ?roomtype .
  ?hotel a :Hotels .
  ?roomtype p:hasHotel ?hotel .
  ?city a :City .
  ?hotel p:hasCity ?city .
  ?hotel p:name ?name .
  ?leisurefeature p:feature ?feature_w .
  ?leisurefeature p:feature ?feature_w2 .
  ?city p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?feature_w) = "Swimming Pool" || STR(?feature_w2) = "Hot Tub")) && STR(?name_w) = "New York"))
}

queries.question: List all hotels with swimming pools and also list hotels with hot tubs in New York.
queries.sql:
SELECT Hotel.name 
FROM LeisureFeature JOIN FeatureInRoom ON LeisureFeature.id = FeatureInRoom.leisurefeature_id JOIN RoomType ON FeatureInRoom.roomtype_id = RoomType.id JOIN Hotel ON RoomType.hotel_id = Hotel.id JOIN City ON Hotel.city_id = City.id
WHERE LeisureFeature.feature = "Swimming Pool" OR LeisureFeature.feature = "Hot Tub" AND City.name = "New York"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?leisurefeature a :LeisureFeature .
  ?featureinroom a :FeatureInRoom .
  ?featureinroom p:hasLeisureFeature ?leisurefeature .
  ?roomtype a :RoomTypes .
  ?featureinroom p:hasRoomType ?roomtype .
  ?hotel a :Hotels .
  ?roomtype p:hasHotel ?hotel .
  ?city a :City .
  ?hotel p:hasCity ?city .
  ?hotel p:name ?name .
  ?leisurefeature p:feature ?feature_w .
  ?leisurefeature p:feature ?feature_w2 .
  ?city p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?feature_w) = "Swimming Pool" || (STR(?feature_w2) = "Hot Tub" && STR(?name_w) = "New York")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show hotels with swimming pools or hot tubs in New York.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?leisurefeature a :LeisureFeature .
  ?featureinroom a :FeatureInRoom .
  ?featureinroom p:hasLeisureFeature ?leisurefeature .
  ?roomtype a :RoomTypes .
  ?featureinroom p:hasRoomType ?roomtype .
  ?hotel a :Hotels .
  ?roomtype p:hasHotel ?hotel .
  ?city a :City .
  ?hotel p:hasCity ?city .
  ?hotel p:name ?name .
  ?leisurefeature p:feature ?feature_w .
  ?leisurefeature p:feature ?feature_w2 .
  ?city p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?feature_w) = "Swimming Pool" || STR(?feature_w2) = "Hot Tub")) && STR(?name_w) = "New York"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?leisurefeature a :LeisureFeature .
  ?featureinroom a :FeatureInRoom .
  ?featureinroom p:hasLeisureFeature ?leisurefeature .
  ?roomtype a :RoomTypes .
  ?featureinroom p:hasRoomType ?roomtype .
  ?hotel a :Hotels .
  ?roomtype p:hasHotel ?hotel .
  ?city a :City .
  ?hotel p:hasCity ?city .
  ?hotel p:name ?name .
  ?leisurefeature p:feature ?feature_w .
  ?leisurefeature p:feature ?feature_w2 .
  ?city p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?feature_w) = "Swimming Pool" || (STR(?feature_w2) = "Hot Tub" && STR(?name_w) = "New York")))
} }
}
